Hero.label: STRATEGIC LOGISTICS PARTNER AT TA LUNG INTERNATIONAL BORDER GATE
Hero.title:
CONNECTING BORDERS
REACHING THE WORLD
Hero.subtitle: Establishing our position since 2008, Ta Lung Quang Minh proudly provides the safest, fastest, and most cost-effective solutions for customs clearance, warehousing, and multimodal transport.

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Over a decade of building a seamless supply chain at Ta Lung International Border Gate

intro.title: COMPANY OVERVIEW
intro.content:
Established in 2008, formerly known as Phu Anh Trading and Transportation Co., Ltd., Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company has rapidly grown to become a leading force in border logistics. Capturing the trade flow between Vietnam and China through Ta Lung International Border Gate, we have heavily invested in international-standard warehousing systems and import-export cargo gathering sites.

Our comprehensive service ecosystem covers: Warehousing, Bus Stations, Customs Agency, and International Multimodal Transport.

AboutPage.missionText: Our mission is to eliminate all customs clearance barriers and optimize the supply chain through transparency and speed. Our strategic vision is to become the most crucial link on the Vietnam - China economic corridor.

timeline.stage1_text: Established Phu Anh Trading and Transportation Co., Ltd., laying the first bricks for cross-border transport services.
timeline.stage2_text: Transformed into Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company, expanded infrastructure investment to 25 hectares, establishing new customs clearance standards.
timeline.stage3_text: Fully integrate into the border gate system formed by Ta Lung and Chi Ma, creating an integrated logistics service chain along the border.

facilities.warehouseContent: Owning 3 strategic yards: Phu Anh, Vu Thanh, and Son Cang with a total area of up to 25 hectares. The closed-design infrastructure perfectly meets the strictest standards for storing and transshipping heavy-tonnage cargo.
facilities.transportContent: Operating a robust fleet of trucks with various tonnages, ready to meet all multimodal transportation challenges of enterprises with flexibility and absolute safety.

1.title: Receive & Evaluate
1.desc: Receive plans, documents, and consult on optimal solutions

2.title: Customs Declaration
2.desc: Handle legal procedures and ultra-fast customs clearance

3.title: Vehicle Dispatch
3.desc: Direct and coordinate vehicles to specialized transshipment areas

4.title: Safe Transshipment
4.desc: Safely transship goods with specialized equipment and a professional team

5.title: Completion & Handover
5.desc: Complete exit procedures, track the final mile, and hand over the cargo

vision.title: FUTURE ORIENTATION
vision.content:
Ta Lung Quang Minh is currently undergoing a strong transformation, focusing on digitizing processes and comprehensively upgrading logistics warehousing infrastructure.

Our ambition does not stop at Ta Lung. The long-term goal is to seamlessly connect business operations into the Ta Lung and Chi Ma border gate system, establishing a closed border service chain. Thereby, affirming our position as a key intersection connecting trade between Vietnam and China.

offices.caobang: Ta Lung International Border Gate Area, Phuc Hoa Commune, Cao Bang Province

ServiceDetail.ctaTitle: Need a more optimal logistics plan?

WhyChooseUs.title: Guaranteeing Your Success
WhyChooseUs.point1Text: Owning a 25-hectare gathering yard fully equipped with the most modern lifting and handling equipment right at the center of trade.
WhyChooseUs.point2Text: A team of experts with deep knowledge of cross-border trade policies, flexibly handling all customs clearance situations 24/7.
WhyChooseUs.point3Text: Committed to minimizing yard storage time, with clear procedural workflows and transparent costs with no hidden fees.

Partners.title: Trusted partner of hundreds of import-export enterprises

ContactPage.title: Connect With Us
ContactPage.description: The Ta Lung Quang Minh team is always ready to listen and solve your supply chain challenges. Contact us today.

faq.q1: What is the average customs clearance processing speed at the company?
faq.a1: With valid documents and prior preparation, customs procedures at Ta Lung Quang Minh's yard average less than 2 working hours.
faq.q2: Does the company support the transshipment of special cargo?
faq.a2: Absolutely. With a diverse equipment system and 25 hectares of space, we have the capacity to safely handle and transship all types of goods, from agricultural products and minerals to oversized and overweight machinery.
faq.q3: Can I request waterway or railway transportation?
faq.a3: Yes. Ta Lung Quang Minh proudly provides multimodal transportation solutions, flexibly combining road, waterway, and railway to optimize freight rates according to your needs.

ManifestoPage.title: Value Manifesto
ManifestoPage.subtitle: CONNECTING BORDERS - REACHING THE WORLD
ManifestoPage.value1Text: All processes from quoting to customs clearance are standardized. Customers clearly understand all costs and cargo routes.
ManifestoPage.value2Text: Time is customer profit. We react quickly to remove all bottlenecks in the operational stages.
ManifestoPage.value3Text: The success of our partners is the measure of our capability. Ta Lung Quang Minh aims for long-term strategic partnerships.
ManifestoPage.value4Text: Business operations are inseparable from environmental awareness and contributing to the economic prosperity of the border region.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.content:
Welcome to the official web portal of Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company.

By accessing and interacting on this website, you are deemed to have understood and accepted the following provisions.

### 1. CUSTOMER OBLIGATIONS
- Ensure the truthfulness and accuracy of the information provided via quote, application, or contact forms.
- Strictly prohibit any acts of spreading malicious code, interfering, or illegally exploiting our database system.

### 2. COPYRIGHT AND INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
- All text content, brand identity, images, and source code on the website are intellectual property managed by Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company.
- Copying, distributing, or using for commercial purposes without written consent from the company is illegal.

### 3. DISCLAIMER POLICY
- Information listed on the website is for illustrative and capacity introduction purposes. Depending on the time and actual contract, operating terms may be adjusted. We are not legally responsible for decisions based entirely on website content without direct consultation.

### 4. RIGHT TO UPDATE
The company reserves the right to adjust, change, or delete these terms at any time without prior notice.

PrivacyPage.title: Data Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.content:
Ta Lung Quang Minh Joint Stock Company values and is committed to absolutely protecting the safety of personal data as well as the business information of our partners.

### 1. SCOPE OF COLLECTION
The system only records data proactively provided by users via forms (including: Name, phone number, email, request content) and anonymous access data (cookies) for statistical purposes.

### 2. PURPOSE OF USE
The collected data is used exclusively for the following purposes:
- Analyzing requests and contacting to consult on solutions and provide quotes.
- Supporting the resolution of incidents related to operating processes.
- Improving the user interface experience on the website.

### 3. CONFIDENTIALITY COMMITMENT
We apply the most advanced data encryption standards. All customer information is retained in our internal system, and we commit NOT to sell, exchange, or transfer it to any third party, except in cases requested by competent authorities as prescribed by law.

### 4. USER RIGHTS
You have full rights to request the extraction, modification, or deletion of personal information from our system at any time via the official support email: **info@talunglogistics.com**.
